nlp.title: Natural Language Processing (NLP) Tutorial For Beginners
nlp.creator: freeCodeCamp.org
nlp.description: Dive into the foundations of Natural Language Processing with this comprehensive beginner's guide. Learn essential concepts like text preprocessing, tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, and basic NLP models to kickstart your journey.

nlp.title: Hugging Face Transformers Course
nlp.creator: Hugging Face
nlp.description: Master the state-of-the-art Transformer models for various NLP tasks directly from the experts at Hugging Face. This playlist provides a practical, hands-on approach to using their library for text classification, question answering, and more.

nlp.title: Natural Language Processing Specialization
nlp.creator: DeepLearning.AI
nlp.description: Unlock the power of human language with this world-class specialization from DeepLearning.AI. Progress through traditional NLP methods to advanced deep learning architectures for cutting-edge text analysis and generation.

nlp.title: NLP - Natural Language Processing with Python
nlp.creator: Jose Portilla, Pierian Training
nlp.description: Gain practical expertise in NLP by building real-world projects using Python and popular libraries like NLTK and SpaCy. This course covers everything from text classification and sentiment analysis to topic modeling and chatbots.
